description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 42 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Copper coloured stainless steel case for durability, style and comfort Black leather strap with a tang clasp Off white dial and date aperture across the whole watch with a design on top Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 12 hour mark Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
